message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Auth form component CSS spec for Task #4">
Lea, Task #4 (registration) is now in progress. Here's the component CSS we'll need for the auth form. This goes in the `@layer components` section of main.css.

**Auth form component (`.auth-form`):**
```css
.auth-form {
  max-inline-size: 24rem;
  margin-inline: auto;
}

.auth-form__fields {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: var(--space-lg); /* 24px between form groups */
}

.auth-form__group {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: var(--space-xs); /* 4px between label and input */
}

.auth-form__submit {
  inline-size: 100%;
  margin-block-start: var(--space-lg); /* 24px above button */
}

.auth-form__error {
  color: var(--color-danger);
  font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
  margin-block-start: var(--space-xs);
}

.auth-form__footer {
  margin-block-start: var(--space-lg);
  text-align: center;
  font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
  color: var(--color-fg-muted);
}
```

Also -- have you had a chance to apply the 10 token adjustments I sent earlier? I want to make sure the tokens are finalized before we start building component styles on top of them. The token values affect the component CSS (especially the spacing names -- `--space-md` should be 16px, not 12px).
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Steve is providing auth form specs and asking again about the 10 adjustments. Let me first check if the task breakdown consensus has actually been reached and whether I should be writing component CSS yet.

Looking at the messages: the team lead said "do NOT start any feature work until the task breakdown is agreed upon." But Steve says "Task #4 (registration) is now in progress." There's a conflict. Let me check the task list.

content.content:
#1 [in_progress] Project scaffolding: Cargo.toml, src structure, docker-compose, and configuration (luca-palmieri)
#2 [pending] Walking skeleton: health check endpoint with integration test [blocked by #1]
#3 [completed] Design tokens: CSS custom properties foundation (lea-verou)
#4 [pending] Base HTML template and static file serving [blocked by #2]
#5 [pending] User registration with session infrastructure (US-1) [blocked by #4]
#6 [pending] User login and logout (US-2 + US-3) [blocked by #5]
#7 [pending] View todo list and add todo item (US-4 + US-5) [blocked by #6]
#8 [pending] Complete a todo item (US-6) [blocked by #6]
#9 [pending] Delete a todo item (US-7) [blocked by #6]

tasks.subject: Project scaffolding: Cargo.toml, src structure, docker-compose, and configuration
Walking skeleton: health check endpoint with integration test
Design tokens: CSS custom properties foundation
Base HTML template and static file serving
View todo list and add todo item (US-4 + US-5)

content.text:
Good -- the task list has been updated with the new breakdown. Task #4 is now "Base HTML template and static file serving" (blocked by #2), and Task #5 is "User registration with session infrastructure" (blocked by #4). Registration is NOT in progress -- it's pending and blocked. Steve's message that "Task #4 is in progress" refers to the old task numbering.

The auth form CSS belongs with Task #5 (registration), not Task #4 (base template). I should note Steve's spec for later but not implement it yet -- Task #4 (base template) isn't even unblocked yet (waiting on Task #2, which is waiting on Task #1).

input.content:
Steve -- two things:

**1. Your 10 token adjustments are already applied.** I've confirmed this three times now. Every value in the committed CSS matches your spec verbatim. The task list shows Task #3 (Design tokens) as completed. Here are the key ones you keep asking about:
- `--space-md` = `var(--space-4)` = 16px (not 12px). Line 151.
- Primary blue: `oklch(0.55 0.18 240)`. Line 193.
- All semantic light variants present. Lines 202-206.

The tokens are finalized. Your sign-off would let us formally close this.

**2. Auth form CSS -- noted but not implementing yet.** The task list has been updated with the new breakdown. Registration is now Task #5, blocked by Task #4 (base template + static serving), which is blocked by Task #2 (walking skeleton), which is blocked by Task #1 (scaffolding, in progress). We're several steps away from needing component CSS.

Your auth form spec looks clean and I'll use it when we get to Task #5. I've noted the structure:
- `.auth-form` at 24rem max-width, centered
- `.auth-form__fields` as flex column with `--space-lg` gap
- `.auth-form__group` with `--space-xs` gap between label/input
- `.auth-form__submit` full width with top margin
- `.auth-form__error` in danger color at `--font-size-sm`
- `.auth-form__footer` centered, muted, small

I'll also add the `:has([aria-invalid="true"])` pattern that Carson and I discussed for error state styling. That'll layer on top of your `.auth-form__error` nicely.

Ready to implement when Task #5 is unblocked.
input.summary: Tokens already match your spec, auth form CSS noted for later

My next actionable task is Task #4 (base template + static serving) once Tasks #1 and #2 are complete.
